name: dev-launcher
description: Installeur du projet de jeux FitztheFool : clone les serveurs, génère les .env et installe les dépendances.

scripts.predev: npm run dev:kill && npm run build:shared
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n LOBBY,QUIZ,TABOO,UNO,SKYJOW,YAHTZEE,PUISSANCE4,JUSTONE,BATTLESHIP,DIAMANT,IMPOSTOR,LUDO,PERUDO,CANTSTOP,MILLEBORNES,SPYFALL,ATLANTIDE,ABALONE,BLOKUS,6QUIPREND,TANKS,COMPLOT,DAMES "npm run dev:lobby" "npm run dev:quiz" "npm run dev:taboo" "npm run dev:uno" "npm run dev:skyjow" "npm run dev:yahtzee" "npm run dev:puissance4" "npm run dev:justone" "npm run dev:battleship" "npm run dev:diamant" "npm run dev:impostor" "npm run dev:ludo" "npm run dev:perudo" "npm run dev:cantstop" "npm run dev:millebornes" "npm run dev:spyfall" "npm run dev:atlantide" "npm run dev:abalone" "npm run dev:blokus" "npm run dev:sixquiprend" "npm run dev:tanks" "npm run dev:complot" "npm run dev:dames"
